title: korthalsella rubra subsp. rubra
intro: Korthalsella rubra subsp. rubra is a rare, carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Frankeniaceae, characterized by its unique ability to obtain essential nutrients by capturing and digesting insects. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Korthalsella rubra subsp. rubra include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water or using it as a tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
